mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fulfillment_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, fulfillment_id, order_id, fulfillment_status, priority, fulfillment_type, total_items, assigned_picker_id, assigned_packer_id, pick_started_at, pick_completed_at, pack_started_at, pack_completed_at, shipped_at, carrier, tracking_number, estimated_ship_date, estimated_delivery_date, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_code, warehouse_city, created_time ) SELECT fo.id, fo.tenant, NOW(), fo.id, fo.order_id, fo.state_id, fo.priority, fo.fulfillment_type, fo.total_items, fo.assigned_picker_id, fo.assigned_packer_id, fo.pick_started_at, fo.pick_completed_at, fo.pack_started_at, fo.pack_completed_at, fo.shipped_at, fo.carrier, fo.tracking_number, fo.estimated_ship_date, fo.estimated_delivery_date, fo.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_code, w.city, fo.created_time FROM hm_fulfillment.fulfillment_orders fo LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON fo.warehouse_id = w.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.settlement_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, settlement_id, order_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, settlement_status, order_amount, commission_amount, commission_rate, platform_fee, tds_amount, gst_on_commission, net_payout, currency, period_start, period_end, created_time ) SELECT st.id, st.tenant, NOW(), st.id, st.order_id, st.supplier_id, s.business_name, st.state_id, st.order_amount, st.commission_amount, st.commission_rate, st.platform_fee, st.tds_amount, st.gst_on_commission, st.net_amount, st.currency, st.settlement_period_start, st.settlement_period_end, st.created_time FROM hm_settlement.settlements st LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON st.supplier_id = s.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.order_activity_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, activity_id, order_id, activity_name, activity_comment, activity_success, created_by, created_time ) SELECT oa.id, oa.tenant, NOW(), oa.id, oa.order_id, oa.activity_name, oa.activity_comment, oa.activity_success, oa.created_by, oa.created_time FROM hm_order.order_activity oa
